creator: anarcat+register@orangeseeds.org
text:
A new upstream version of sobby is available. It packages new functionalities and bugfixes.

Fix: This patch has an issue: the manpage is installed in /usr/local/share/man instead of /usr/local/man. I don't exactly know how to fix that because I don't understand how to make autoconf/automake change the datadir... I'll try to figure that out and will post a followup, unless someone else can fix it. :)
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A.
